kw.name: Run Keywords
Open Higala App Session Only
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Application
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Start Screen Recording
kw.doc: Starts an asynchronous Screen Recording for the current open application.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Opens Appium session without pm clear — preserves existing login session.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: Capture Screenshot On Failure will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to be executed when an AppiumLibrary keyword fails.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.name: TC_M5.8_012 Verify that Rizal Commercial Banking Corporation appears in the Other Bank search results for RB-to-RB transfer

kw.name: Switch To San Antonio App
Activate Application
kw.doc: Activates the application if it is not running or is running in the background.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Brings the San Antonio app to the foreground on emulator-5554.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[contains(@text,'available balance') or contains(@text,'Available balance')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='Send Funds'] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='Send Funds'] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text='Send Funds']
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath=//android.widget.TextView[@text='Rizal Commercial Banking Corporation']'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page contains the element with the ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: m5.8.12: All RB-to-RB transfers route through RCBC as the Instapay intermediary. Searching "rc" in Other Bank shows Rizal Commercial Banking Corporation in results.

test.name: TC_M5.1_001 Verify that the user can successfully send money to another account within the same bank

kw.name: Navigate To Same Bank OTP Screen
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
Run Keyword And Return Status
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.arg: Could not capture screenshot — no active Appium session
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.msg: Running command 'adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.higala.ruralbanksanantonioitg 2>&1'.

External (other-bank) transfers always show "Transfer Pending" first. Navigation buttons (Refresh page / Back to Home) may be scrolled below the fold on long result screens — a scroll down is performed before clicking.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc: m5.2.1: Full happy-path other-bank (RCBC) transfer — no recent recipient. NOTE: Transfer Pending is the EXPECTED initial state for external/Instapay transfers. The result screen will show Transfer Pending first; Refresh page polls for final status.

test.name: TC_M5.7_001 Verify that the user can successfully send money to another of their own savings accounts

test.doc: m5.7.1: Self-transfer between own savings accounts (Account A → B)

test.name: TC_M5.8_001 Verify that San Antonio can successfully send money to Abucay account

kw.name: Switch To San Antonio App
Activate Application
kw.doc: Activates the application if it is not running or is running in the background.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Brings the San Antonio app to the foreground on emulator-5554.

kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[contains(@text,'To Rizal') or contains(@text,'To China') or contains(@text,'To ')] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[contains(@text,'To Rizal') or contains(@text,'To China') or contains(@text,'To ')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

From San Antonio Send Funds screen, tap Other Bank and select RCBC. NOTE: All RB-to-RB transfers (San Antonio → Abucay) route through Rizal Commercial Banking Corporation (RCBC) as the Instapay intermediary. The recipient account number identifies the Abucay account on the RCBC network.

External (other-bank) transfers always show "Transfer Pending" first. Navigation buttons (Refresh page / Back to Home) may be scrolled below the fold on long result screens — a scroll down is performed before clicking.

test.doc: m5.8.1: Full happy-path RB-to-RB external transfer. San Antonio (sender) → Abucay (receiver, acct: 7710501333354703). Transfer Pending is expected on result screen (external Instapay transfer).

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Sanitize Filename
kw.msg: Variable '${TEST NAME}' not found. Did you mean: ${PREV_TEST_NAME}
kw.doc: Replace characters not safe for filenames with underscores.
kw.status: Variable '${TEST NAME}' not found. Did you mean: ${PREV_TEST_NAME}

kw.msg: ${r} = ('FAIL', "Variable '${TEST NAME}' not found. Did you mean:\n ${PREV_TEST_NAME}")
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Stop Screen Recording
kw.doc: Gathers the output from the previously started screen recording to a media file, then embeds it to the log.html(Android Only).
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.

errors.msg: Error in file '/Users/jocelynjavier/Higala/Mobile App/Modules/SendMoney/M5_Send_Money.robot' on line 186: The '[Return]' setting is deprecated. Use the 'RETURN' statement instead.
Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open
